headline: Astro one-page factory proven; 3 placeholder preview apps deployed behind the basic-auth gate. Shared config acceptance guard live (checkClientAcceptance, #37/#45) — catches placeholder/ungated-prod leaks before build. SITE_LIVE closed-by-default gate (#34) shipped on _template + monroe. Autonomous Ralph burndown loop wired in CI (#43-#48, #57). Engine still frozen pending ops cutover (#10). Pre-revenue — no paying client yet.
next: Land the in-review Ralph PRs: backport SITE_LIVE gate to the 4 stale apps (#50), run root pnpm test in CI (#51), schema/scripts test coverage (#53/#54)
Set real form.accessKey (Web3Forms) + hcaptchaSiteKey before any prospect outreach
Delete the frozen packages/agent engine once ops's first live generate passes (#10)
blocked: Autonomous site generation blocked on ANTHROPIC_API_KEY (in ops)
Engine delete (#10) waits on ops's first live generate
